ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] See the list of suggested books on p.93 of Dollars & Sense.
[ ] See the list of suggested websites on p.94 of Dollars & Sense.
[ ] Look for ways to serve your community. See [this post](https://www.cminst.org/blog/noticing-november-education-as-service) for a few ideas to get you started.
